---
title: "lbstproj"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{lbstproj}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
# Define a temporary project folder and create it
tmp_proj_dir <- fs::path(tempdir(), "mock-lbstproj")
fs::dir_create(tmp_proj_dir)

# Define it as the working directory for the vignette
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = tmp_proj_dir)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r project-setup}
library(lbstproj)

create_project(
  # path = ".",
  path = tmp_proj_dir,
  title = "FAKE trial",
  client = "John Doe",
  department = "DPT",
  author = "Jane Doe",
  open = FALSE,
  force = TRUE
)
```

```{r generate-data-file, echo=FALSE}
# data <- gtsummary::trial |>
#   write.csv(fs::path(tmp_proj_dir, "data/raw", "trial.csv"))
# IMPORT FROM CSV EXTDATA
```

```{r}
fs::dir_tree(fs::path("data"))
```
